subcodes.first_line: O Jalál! The grace of the Most Glorious Beauty towards His loved ones transcendeth description and surpasseth what pen and ink can express. Behold thou this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جلال فضل جمال ابهی در حق احبایش اعظم از وصف و بیان قلم و رقمست ملاحظه نما
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @development of capacity and readiness, @Manifestation of God as sun
